summary: Rough FM tape with uneven mix but an energetic spring‑groove show that shines on a fiery Alligator performance.
review: The recording is an FM broadcast source that sounds rough and a bit muddy, though the mix clears up in spots. Musically the band is high‑energy, featuring extra percussion (more drums, more cowbell) and a standout rendition of "Alligator" with Garcia’s guitar described as progressive and relentless.

ai_rating.rationale: Review praises the performance (≈4/5) but notes a rough, uneven recording (≈2.5/5); weighted average yields ~3.6 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FM broadcast tape is rough and noisy; occasional clean mix moments but overall uneven levels and hiss.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Spring‑groove vibe with guest musicians from Santana, heavy percussion section early on, maintains high energy through the set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar work called "progressive" and praised for nonstop intensity during the percussion ensemble.
band_member_comments.Drums: Extra drums and cowbell highlighted; percussion section described as a major feature of the show.
